author: y4rr
content: Phase 5 V8: paged lm_head shipped. PagedLmHead struct with from_state_dict/from_bits/ensure_resident/release. PagedLlamaInferencer.lm_head_paged + enable_paged_lm_head + release_lm_head methods. Forward dispatches on paged vs resident. New tests: ensure_resident_then_release_round_trips (verifies bf16 bits survive Vram→drop→reload), shape_mismatch_errors. 80 tests pass.
